title: dracophyllum longifolium var. cockayneanum
intro: Dracophyllum longifolium var. cockayneanum, also known as a shrub native to New Zealand, is a variant of the Dracophyllum longifolium species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its rich source of flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have shown antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dracophyllum longifolium var. cockayneanum include its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation, as well as its possible antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are used to support immune function and overall well-being.
